summary: Subscription System Migration Testing Complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for both Super Admin Plans tab and Admin Billing page. The migration from hardcoded SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS to centralized MongoDB-based system is functioning correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts click events on Cancel button, making it difficult to close modal via button click
ui_bugs.workaround: User can click X button or click outside modal to close

passed_tests: GET /api/billing/plans - returns plans from master_plans system
GET /api/billing/plans - includes Free, Starter, Basic, Pro, Enterprise plans
GET /api/billing/plans - source is master_plans or legacy
GET /api/billing/subscription - requires authentication
GET /api/billing/subscription - returns subscription data for admin
GET /api/billing/usage - requires authentication
GET /api/billing/usage - returns usage stats with correct limits
GET /api/subscriptions/plans/master - requires Super Admin
GET /api/subscriptions/plans/master - returns plans for Super Admin
GET /api/subscriptions/plans/master - supports include_inactive parameter
POST /api/subscriptions/plans/master - requires Super Admin
POST /api/subscriptions/plans/master - validates required fields
PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/master/{id} - requires Super Admin
PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/master/{id} - returns error for non-existent plan
GET /api/subscriptions/analytics - requires Super Admin
GET /api/subscriptions/analytics - returns analytics with overview and revenue
GET /api/subscriptions/analytics - includes plan distribution
GET /api/subscriptions/analytics/revenue-trends - requires Super Admin
GET /api/subscriptions/analytics/revenue-trends - returns trend data
Billing plans match master plans when available
Plan pricing verified: Free (₹0), Starter (₹499), Basic (₹999), Pro (₹2499), Enterprise (₹4999)
UI: Super Admin Plans tab displays all 5 plans
UI: Super Admin Plans tab shows MRR/ARR stats
UI: Super Admin Plans tab shows subscriber counts
UI: Admin Billing page displays plan cards
UI: Admin Billing page shows current plan (Pro) with Active status
UI: Admin Billing page shows upgrade/switch/downgrade buttons
UI: Admin Billing page upgrade modal shows proration calculation
UI: Admin Billing page shows usage stats
UI: Admin Billing page prevents downgrade when usage exceeds limits
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription system migration is complete - /api/billing/* endpoints now use plans_master collection
Fallback to legacy SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS dictionary is properly implemented
Super Admin endpoints correctly require superadmin role
Plan versioning system is implemented in subscription_system.py
Proration calculation working correctly in upgrade modal
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing accounts and master plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system migration testing complete. The app uses centralized MongoDB-based subscription management via subscription_system.py. Plans are stored in plans_master collection. Super Admin can manage plans via /api/subscriptions/plans/master endpoints. Admin billing page at /billing shows plan cards with upgrade/downgrade functionality. Demo admin (demo@brandmafia.com) is on Pro plan. All 5 plans available: Free (₹0), Starter (₹499), Basic (₹999), Pro (₹2499), Enterprise (₹4999).

features: Includes all 5 plans with correct pricing
Falls back to legacy plans if master_plans empty
Uses new subscription system with fallback
Includes plan details, status, period dates
Uses limits from new subscription system
Soft delete with active subscriber check
Plan cards with features and pricing
Downgrade prevention when usage exceeds limits

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/billing/subscription: PASS - Returns subscription with plan details
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/billing/usage: PASS - Returns usage stats with limits
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/subscriptions/plans/master: PASS - Super Admin only, returns all plans
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/subscriptions/plans/master: PASS - Super Admin only, validates fields
